# Production-Ready Microservices (Susan J. Fowler)

Before writing, modifying, or planning any code, you MUST use your `read_file` tool to load the relevant guidelines from `.roo/vendor/`. You may read multiple files if the task crosses domains.

## Table of Contents:
    - [Microservices](.roo/vendor/architecture/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/01-microservices.md): Designing, architecting, extracting, or refactoring microservices, transitioning from monolithic applications to distributed systems, defining API endpoints, configuring inter-service communication, or organizing microservice repositories and ecosystem infrastructure.
    - [Production-Readiness](.roo/vendor/architecture/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/02-production-readiness.md): Designing, auditing, reviewing, or implementing the architecture, infrastructure, operational procedures, or lifecycle of a microservice, including tasks related to service-level agreements (SLAs), deployment pipelines, system scaling, failure mitigation, observability (monitoring/logging), and microservice documentation.
    - [Stability and Reliability](.roo/vendor/architecture/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/03-stability-and-reliability.md): The design, implementation, configuration, or review of microservice architecture, CI/CD pipelines, development cycle processes, dependency management (defensive programming, caching), routing and discovery (load balancing, health checks, circuit breakers), and microservice/API endpoint deprecation and decommissioning procedures.
    - [Scalability and Performance](.roo/vendor/architecture/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/04-scalability-and-performance.md): Designing, evaluating, refactoring, or optimizing the architecture, infrastructure, scaling logic, or performance characteristics of microservices, including capacity planning, resource allocation, traffic routing, task processing pipelines, and database selection or configuration for distributed systems.
    - [Fault Tolerance and Catastrophe-Preparedness](.roo/vendor/architecture/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/05-fault-tolerance-and-catastrophe-preparedness.md): Microservice architecture design, review, and refactoring; CI/CD deployment pipeline configuration; resiliency test suite generation (unit, integration, end-to-end, load, and chaos); incident response playbook and runbook authoring; monitoring/alerting logic for remediation; and system outage/failure triage.
    - [Monitoring](.roo/vendor/architecture/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/06-monitoring.md): Configuring, designing, reviewing, or implementing monitoring, logging, dashboards, alerting rules, or incident response documentation (runbooks) for microservices or distributed systems, typically involving tools like Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, ELK/EFK stack, Splunk, PagerDuty, or other observability platforms.
    - [Documentation and Understanding](.roo/vendor/architecture/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/07-documentation-and-understanding.md): The creation, review, structuring, or updating of documentation for a microservice, system architecture, on-call runbook, onboarding guide, API specification, or the performance of production-readiness audits, architecture reviews, and production-readiness roadmaps.
